title: Keyless Door Lock/Security Alarm System (MICU) Input Inspection

crossRefs.label: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box.

blocks.text: Keyless Door Lock/Security Alarm System (MICU) Input Inspection

items.text: Before inspection, check the blown and connected state of the relay box, No. A10 (10A), No. A14 (10A) and fuse boxes No. B26 (7.5A), C17 (7.5A), No. C34 (30A) and sub fuse/relay box No. C1 (15A) fuses.
The fuses No.C23 (15A) and No.C35 (15A) and the fuses No.C38 (15A) and No.C37 (15A) are on the same circuit, so when a fuse blows, the other fuse should also be checked and replaced if necessary.
Ansa If there is a problem with the backlight Check turn signal/hazard light inputs.

blocks.text: 1. Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box.

refs.label: Disconnect each coupler from the fuse box.

blocks.text: 2. Perform input inspection, if all is normal and there is something wrong with the system, Replace fuse box Do. Each coupler is all female-terminated on the cord side.

rows.text: Inspection items in case of abnormality
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G202) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G403) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Shorting the Z1 and F6 terminals and shorting the F3 terminal to body ground
Driver Door Lock Actuator must be activated (LOCK)
Driver Door lock actuator Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Shorting the Z1 and F3 terminals and shorting the F6 terminal to body ground
Driver Door Lock Actuator must be activated (UNLOCK)
Short-circuit the Z1 and P2 terminals and short-circuit the P4 terminal to body ground.
Assistant Door Lock Actuator must be activated (LOCK)
Assisted door lock actuator Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Short-circuit the Z1 and P4 terminals, and short-circuit the P2 terminal to body ground.
Assistant Door Lock Actuator must be activated (UNLOCK)
Short-circuit the Z1 and E2 terminals and short-circuit the E5 terminal to body ground.
R. Rear door lock actuator must operate (LOCK)
R. Rear door lock actuator Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Short-circuit the Z1 and E5 terminals, and short-circuit the E2 terminal to body ground.
R. Rear door lock actuator must operate (UNLOCK)
Shorting the Z1 and E7 terminals and shorting the D4 terminal to body ground
L. Rear door lock actuator must operate (LOCK)
L. Rear door lock actuator Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Shorting the Z1 and D4 terminals and shorting the E7 terminal to body ground
L. Rear door lock actuator must operate (UNLOCK)
Short-circuit the Z1 and E8 terminals and short-circuit the E6 terminal to body ground.
Tailgate lock actuator Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Short-circuit the Z1 and E6 terminals and short-circuit the E8 terminal to body ground.
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G301) Bonnet latch switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Driver Door switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.

Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
R. Rear door switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G503) Tailgate latch switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
L. Rear door switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Driver Door lock knob switch LOCK position
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) Driver Door lock knob switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Driver Door lock knob switch UNLOCK position
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G503) Tailgate lock/unlock switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Shift position sensor Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
Shorting J19 terminal to body ground
horn Horn Relay Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
